prompt: An anime-style illustration of a young woman with short black hair with bangs and purple eyes, leaning casually against a vibrant pink vending machine on a cobblestone city street. She is wearing an oversized light purple hoodie, frayed denim shorts, black high-top sneakers, and a black backpack. Her arms are crossed, and her legs are crossed at the ankles as she looks calmly to the side. The side of the vending machine features a large, striking advertisement for an energy drink: a black can with a pink graffiti-style smiley face with X eyes and a sticking-out tongue, accompanied by the large text "NOPE". The front of the machine displays rows of various bottled drinks, with a second identical black and pink can graphic visible on the lower panel. The scene is brightly lit with detailed shading and vibrant colors.
